for: officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
to: comply with any request under subsection (2)
specify the period for which the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer is to monitor compliance with the order

conditions.text: the period specified may not exceed twelve months

to: take such steps as may be specified in the order

conditions.text: with a view to enabling the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer to comply with the court's request under subsection (2)
the individual is a child unless he is a parent of the child with respect to whom the order falling within subsection (1) was made

to: make a request under subsection (2) in relation to a child arrangements order that is an excepted order

conditions.text: on making the child arrangements order (or the order varying the child arrangements order)
at any time during the subsequent course of the proceedings as they relate to contact with the child concerned or to the child's living arrangements

to: ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to monitor whether an individual falling within subsection (3) complies with each provision of any of those kinds that is contained in the child arrangements order
report to the court on such matters relating to the individual's compliance as the court may specify in the request
